nasb.text: And I heard the voice of a man between the banks of Ulai, and he called out and said, “Gabriel, give this man an understanding of the vision.”

esv.text: And I heard a man’s voice between the banks of the Ulai, and it called, “Gabriel, make this man understand the vision.”

cnv.text: 我又聽見從烏萊河兩岸之間，有人的聲音呼叫著說：“加百列啊！你要使這人明白這異象。”

ccb.text: 我听见有人声从乌莱河两岸之间呼喊：“加百列啊，要让此人明白这异象。”
